title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel hosts economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell to discuss how improved AI capabilities might paradoxically reduce AI's economic share, and explores questions of optimal taxation, wealth redistribution, and global inequality in an AGI scenario. The discussion challenges intuitions about AI economics using economic theory.
